title: Install review and document search helpers
goal: Add difftastic and ripgrep-all/rga as helper views for PR review and document search without replacing GitHub/CI/runtime evidence.

acceptance.assertion: difftastic is available as an explicit helper command or alias and does not replace mandatory git diff evidence.
rga can search at least one PDF or Office-style test document, or missing adapters are documented.
Sensitive paths are excluded from broad document search defaults.
Review guidance states that helper search/diff output is orientation evidence, not final truth by itself.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
